overall.description: First-person gameplay footage in a snowy arctic forest at night under aurora borealis. The player approaches a log cabin, explores its interior rooms containing survival supplies and workshop equipment, then exits to a frozen lake and dives through an ice hole into an underwater environment with bioluminescent flora.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest clearing with military vehicles and crashed aircraft

events.description: approaching and entering the covered porch of the log cabin

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a log cabin, passing military vehicles parked outside

notable_agents.action: military humvee parked in snow with camouflage pattern
military truck parked near cabin entrance

entered.detail: destroyed helicopter fuselage partially buried in snow among pine trees
rustic log cabin with stone foundation and warm interior lights visible through windows
dense evergreen trees surrounding the clearing under aurora-lit sky

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a snowy forest clearing at night under the aurora borealis, approaching a log cabin. Military vehicles are parked outside near a crashed helicopter wreck. The camera moves steadily forward toward the cabin's covered porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin storage room with preserved meat and supplies

events.description: entering the cabin interior from the snowy exterior porch

agents.ego_description: moving through the storage room examining shelves, hanging meat carcasses, and supply containers

entered.detail: several animal carcasses hanging from hooks on a wooden ceiling beam
rustic wooden shelving units holding various containers and supplies
large plastic containers with lids stacked on metal shelving
wooden table surface with various tools and items arranged on top

segments.scene_description: Inside the cabin's storage room, fluorescent lights illuminate hanging meat carcasses and wooden shelves stocked with supplies. The player explores the room, examining plastic storage bins and a workbench while the aurora-lit forest disappears from view outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin workshop with crafting station and dartboard

events.description: moving from storage room into adjacent workshop area through connecting doorway

agents.ego_description: examining the workshop area with tools, dartboard, and equipment, occasionally looking out windows at the snowy landscape

entered.detail: dartboard mounted on log wall with wooden cabinet doors
workbench with desk lamp, tools, and crafting materials organized on surface
tall metal storage cabinet with mesh doors
deer antlers mounted on log wall above doorway

segments.scene_description: The player moves into an adjacent workshop room featuring a tool workbench, dartboard on the wall, and a metal locker. The space has rustic log walls with a deer skull mount and windows showing the snowy exterior. The hanging meat and storage bins of the previous room are no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lake with ice fishing hole near cabin

events.description: exiting the cabin back into the snowy night environment
approaching and descending into the ice hole in the frozen lake

agents.ego_description: leaving the cabin and walking across the snow-covered frozen lake to an ice fishing hole

entered.detail: snow-covered ice surface with visible cracks and snow drifts
circular hole cut in ice with rope tied to nearby stake
second log cabin visible across the frozen lake among trees

segments.scene_description: The player exits the cabin into the aurora-lit night, walking across the frozen lake surface toward an ice fishing hole. The workshop interior is left behind as the camera approaches the dark water opening in the ice, with another cabin visible in the distance across the lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater cavern beneath frozen lake with bioluminescent flora

events.description: submerging into the icy water beneath the frozen lake surface

agents.ego_description: swimming underwater beneath the ice sheet, navigating by the glow of bioluminescent plants

entered.detail: translucent ice sheet overhead with green aurora light filtering through
rocky terrain and boulders covering the lake bottom
glowing red underwater plants and coral-like structures providing dim red illumination

segments.scene_description: Submerged beneath the frozen lake, the player swims through dark water illuminated by the aurora glow filtering through the ice ceiling above. Red bioluminescent flora lights the rocky underwater terrain as the player explores the submerged environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a frozen arctic forest into the depths of a bioluminescent underwater cavern. It begins by moving through a snowy clearing under the aurora borealis, passing military vehicles and a helicopter wreck toward the porch of a log cabin. As the camera enters the building, the outdoor light vanishes, shifting into the fluorescent glow of a storage room filled with hanging meat and supplies before transitioning into a rustic workshop featuring a tool bench and a deer skull mount. The scene then opens back up to the night air as the camera exits the cabin and traverses the frozen surface of a lake toward a dark ice hole. Finally, the perspective plunges beneath the ice, where the aurora's glow filters through the ceiling to reveal a rocky seabed illuminated by red bioluminescent flora.
